---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to add/improve.

## Use Case
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?
- Who will benefit?
- What's the user impact?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work?
- Describe the expected behavior
- Include any UI/UX considerations
- List any affected components

## Alternative Approaches
Are there other ways to solve this problem?
- Option 1: ...
- Option 2: ...
- Why your solution is better?

## Ui/Ux Considerations
If applicable, describe how this affects:
- User interface
- Mobile responsiveness
- Dark mode
- Accessibility (screen readers, keyboard navigation)

## Technical Considerations
- [ ] Requires backend changes
- [ ] Requires new dependencies
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Performance implications
- [ ] Affects payment flow

## Priority & Scope
- **User Impact**: High / Medium / Low
- **Complexity**: High / Medium / Low
- **Effort Estimate**: 1-2 hours / 1-2 days / 1-2 weeks

## Related
- Related issues: #123, #456
- Related features: List any connected features
- Design specs: Link to Figma/design document if available

## Additional Context
Any other information:
- Screenshots of similar features in other apps
- Research links
- Community feedback
- User requests
